text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dirt or turf? Copano Rickey asks the other
runners why they chose the paths they did.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae chose to run on dirt out of
affection for her hometown. Her rise through the
ranks of the humble dirt track echoes the rising
hopes of the people back home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon, an upperclassman several years
ahead, chose to race on the dirt to fulfill her
dream of rising to fame as an Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Qi can be read more easily through dirt, thus
Copano Rickey believes it the appropriate choice
for further promoting feng shui. Yet something
seems to be off...
